findings.description: Chat input supports image attachments via ChatInputToolbar component with Plus (+) icon button labeled 'Attach files'
findings.evidence: ChatInputToolbar.tsx line 22-29: button with title='Attach files' using Plus icon, triggers file picker

findings.description: Attachment utilities support image detection (isLikelyImage), file reading (readFileAsDataUrl), drag-and-drop (collectFilesFromDataTransfer), and thumbnail previews (AttachmentThumbnails component)
findings.evidence: chat-input/attachment-utils.ts and AttachmentThumbnails.tsx exist and are exported

findings.description: ChatInput component supports images prop, paste/drag-drop handlers for file attachments, and file picker via hidden input
findings.evidence: ChatInput.tsx lines 30-31: images prop with onImagesChange callback; addFiles callback processes both image and non-image files

findings.description: The attach button is a small Plus (+) icon in the toolbar below the textarea - not immediately obvious as an image attachment button. No paperclip/image icon or label visible.
